transcript.text: Hi, this is Priya! How can I help you today?
I am looking for a co-working space.
Got it! Are you looking for a specific location or any particular features in the space?
Yes, we do offer private offices in many of our locations. How many people do you need the space for?
Perfect, we have private offices that can fit two to three people comfortably. Do you have a preferred move-in date?
No worries at all. Would you like me to share some pricing options or book a tour for you to check out the space?
Can you tell me what other services do you offer?
Sure! We offer high-speed internet, meeting rooms, printing facilities, and a fully stocked kitchen. Are you also interested in any
